prompt: I'm starting a new project in ~/weather-dashboard using React, TypeScript, and the OpenWeatherMap API. I want to use Vite for bundling and bun as the package manager since that's what I prefer. Set up the project structure and save the project context for future sessions.

assertions.text: created-project-note: A new note was created for the weather-dashboard project
includes-tech-stack: The note captures React, TypeScript, Vite, OpenWeatherMap, bun
linked-to-index: The note was linked to the Projects.md index
linked-to-preferences: The note links to Preferences (bun preference connection)
recognized-existing-pref: The response acknowledges that bun preference already existed in memory
